playbook.intent: From a qualified-yes discovery, produce a short proposal (1-3 pages) the client can sign within a week. Done = proposal sent, follow-up cadence scheduled, win/loss reason recorded.
playbook.scope: From a qualified-yes discovery, produce a short proposal (1-3 pages) the client can sign within a week. Done = proposal sent, follow-up cadence scheduled, win/loss reason recorded.

success-criteria.criterion: Price + risk stage complete: Pricing breakdown
Send + follow-up stage complete: Proposal sent log

stage.name: Structure
stage.intent: Translate discovery notes into proposal sections.

tasks.task: Sketch sections: problem, scope, price, timeline, terms

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when outline maps to specific discovery quotes.

stage.name: Price + risk
stage.intent: Set price using rate floor + risk uplift; surface terms upfront.

tasks.task: Add risk uplift per identified unknown

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when price ≥ rate floor and terms include deposit.

stage.name: Send + follow-up
stage.intent: Send within 48h, schedule follow-up, record outcome.

tasks.task: Send proposal with read-receipt or doc analytics
Record win/loss reason regardless of outcome

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when win/loss reason recorded.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content proposal-from-discovery-notes --format md, agent: faion get-content proposal-from-discovery-notes --format context, json: faion get-content proposal-from-discovery-notes --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
